_comment: NCQA-flavored rule catalog. Each rule references a primitive check. Will move to a per-client Sheet later; params overridable per client.
_requiredElementsComment: Which elements MUST be present, by provider type. '*' = all types. Prescriber types also require DEA. Per-client override later.

rules.message: State license {state} {license_number} status is '{value}', not active
State license {state} {license_number} expired on {value}
DEA {dea_number} ({state}) expired on {value}
Board certification ({specialty}) expired on {value}
Malpractice policy {policy_number} expired on {value}
Malpractice occurrence coverage {value} below required minimum
Malpractice aggregate coverage {value} below required minimum
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} marked '{status}' but expired {value}
DATA ENTRY: DEA {dea_number} marked '{status}' but expired {value}
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} marked '{status}' but expired {value}
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} has no expiration date
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} issue date after expiration date
DATA ENTRY: {state} license has no license number
DATA ENTRY: license {license_number} has no state
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} has no expiration date
NCQA: license {state} {license_number} has no primary-source verification date
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} issue date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} verified date is in the future
DATA ENTRY: DEA record ({state}) has no DEA number
DATA ENTRY: DEA {dea_number} has no expiration date
NCQA: DEA {dea_number} has no primary-source verification date
DATA ENTRY: board cert ({specialty}) issue date after expiration date
DATA ENTRY: malpractice record has no policy number
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} effective date after expiration date
NCQA: specialty {specialty} has no verification date
NAME MISMATCH: license {state} {license_number} names '{first_name} {last_name}', not the provider
SANCTION: {sanction_type} '{value}' with no supporting source/document — confirm on the sanction website and upload the screenshot
rules.expected: a sanction 'Match Found' must be supported (verified source or uploaded artifact); confirm on the sanction website and, if it doesn't match, upload a screenshot

rules.message: LICENSURE ACTION ({state}): '{value}' with no supporting source/document — obtain and upload the board document
rules.expected: a licensure board action must be supported (verified source or the board's disciplinary-action document); NPDB-sourced non-board reports are handled by the NPDB element

rules.message: NPDB: report present ('{report_type}') with no supporting source/document — review and attach
rules.expected: an NPDB report must be supported (verified source or the NPDB report document) and reviewed

rules.message: NCQA: NPDB query has no verification date
WORK HISTORY: unexplained gap {workHistory_gapStartDate} to {workHistory_gapEndDate} (>6 months)
DATA ENTRY: board cert ({specialty}) issue date {value} is in the future

rules._group: verification-recency + coverage-matrix (client-configurable; e.g. Headway 90/30d, coverage matrix)

rules.message: License {state} {license_number} last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
DEA {dea_number} last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
Board cert ({specialty}) last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
NPDB last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
Sanction {sanction_type} last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
License {state} {license_number} expires {value} -- within client outreach window
Malpractice {policy_number} coverage {_covfound} is below the required {_covreq} for {_covtype} in {_covstate}
rules.expected: coverage must meet the client's minimum for the provider's state and type

rules.message: Malpractice {policy_number} last verified {verified_at} -- outside client recency window
DEA {dea_number} expires {value} -- within client outreach window
Board cert ({specialty}) expires {value} -- within client outreach window
Malpractice COI {policy_number} expires {value} -- within client outreach window

rules._group: additional data-entry / validation (field completeness + date sanity)

rules.message: DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} has no issue date
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} has no license type
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} has no status
DATA ENTRY: DEA {dea_number} has no state
DATA ENTRY: DEA {dea_number} verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: board cert ({specialty}) has no expiration date
DATA ENTRY: a board certification has no specialty
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} has no effective date
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: sanction {sanction_type} verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: a specialty record has no specialty name
DATA ENTRY: DEA {dea_number} has no status
DATA ENTRY: license {state} {license_number} verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: board cert ({specialty}) has no certificate type
DATA ENTRY: board cert ({specialty}) verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} has no occurrence coverage amount
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} has no aggregate coverage amount
DATA ENTRY: malpractice {policy_number} has no expiration date
DATA ENTRY: a sanction record has no sanction type
DATA ENTRY: sanction {sanction_type} has no source listed
DATA ENTRY: sanction {sanction_type} has no action/result recorded
DATA ENTRY: NPDB verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: specialty {specialty} verified date {value} is in the future
DATA ENTRY: a licensure action record has no action type
DATA ENTRY: a licensure action has no state
DEMOGRAPHICS: provider NPI is missing
rules.expected: a valid 10-digit NPI must be present

rules.message: DEMOGRAPHICS: provider first name is missing
rules.expected: provider first name must be present

rules.message: DEMOGRAPHICS: provider last name is missing
rules.expected: provider last name must be present

rules.message: DEMOGRAPHICS: provider type (degree) is missing
rules.expected: provider type / degree must be present

rules.message: DEMOGRAPHICS: provider state(s) missing
rules.expected: at least one practice/credentialing state must be present
